modules.name: Field communications design
outcomes: dependable operational communications across the live field environment
questions: Which intercom, radio, IEM and pitch-side interfaces must remain compatible?

modules.name: Communications-network architecture
outcomes: a coherent primary communications route across required endpoints
questions: Which endpoints, carriers and physical paths form the primary communications route?

modules.name: Signal-path and redundancy planning
outcomes: continuity through defined primary and fallback paths
questions: What failures must the fallback route tolerate without interrupting operation?

modules.name: Broadcast-audio delivery
outcomes: continuous programme-audio delivery into transmission
questions: Is the required feed programme audio, production communications, in-ear monitoring or a combination?

modules.name: Technical systems integration
outcomes: connected technical components operating as one system
questions: Which existing systems, connectors and ownership boundaries must be integrated?

modules.name: Testing and commissioning
outcomes: a verified system ready for operation
questions: What acceptance criteria define readiness for use?

modules.name: Live operational support
outcomes: stable operation through the live delivery window
questions: Who owns live decisions, escalation and recovery during operation?

modules.name: Technical documentation and handover
outcomes: a traceable configuration that can be operated and maintained
questions: Who will own the system and documentation after delivery?

modules.name: Audio production and publishing
outcomes: prepared audio delivered to its intended audience
questions: What source material, edit standard and publishing destination are required?

modules.name: Web and application engineering
outcomes: a usable executable digital service
questions: Which accounts, data sources, APIs and deployment environments must integrate with the service?

modules.name: Data-system definition and engineering
outcomes: structured information that can be interpreted and experienced in multiple ways
questions: Which sources, relationships and interpretations must the data system preserve?

modules.name: Cloud deployment and operations
outcomes: a reliable live production service
questions: Which hosting, security, monitoring and release constraints apply?

modules.name: Brand and identity system
outcomes: a coherent system of recognition and expression
questions: Which existing name, mark, product family or visual-language elements must be retained?

modules.name: Electronics and physical-system integration
outcomes: coordinated device behaviour, software control and system-level testing
questions: Which electrical interfaces, firmware constraints, enclosure limits and test conditions apply?

modules.name: Media-system definition
outcomes: a defined media-system boundary with dependable flow, integration and operating requirements
questions: Which media function is primary: production, broadcast, distribution, streaming, physical playback, interactive installation, control, or archive and access?

modules.name: Physical infrastructure integration
outcomes: a physically organised, powered, connected and commissioned equipment environment
questions: Which equipment, power, cooling, cabling and network interfaces must the rack support?

modules.name: Logo and identity design
outcomes: a distinctive, usable mark and visual identity direction
questions: Is the requirement limited to a mark, or should it establish a wider identity system?

modules.name: Logo recreation and vector artwork
outcomes: clean scalable logo artwork reconstructed from the available visual reference
questions: Which source image and final artwork formats are available or required?

modules.name: Community-platform definition
outcomes: a defined community service with clear participation, content and operating boundaries
questions: Is the primary community function publishing, membership, participation, shared resources, or a combination?

modules.name: System and delivery definition
outcomes: a clear system boundary, operating model and delivery route
questions: Which users, information, interfaces and operating outcomes define the system?
